name: Chile Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Bisquick pancake mix as directed.
2. Place the shredded Mozzarella cheese in each of the hollowed-out green chiles.
3. Dip the stuffed chiles into the prepared pancake batter, ensuring they are well coated.
4. Fry the stuffed chiles in hot oil until golden brown. Turn them only once if possible.
